grant_title: NOAA Great Lakes Fish Habitat Restoration Partnership Grants
geographic_restrictions: Projects must be located within the Great Lakes basin and within one of the eight U.S. Great Lakes states (New York, Pennsylvania, Ohio, Michigan, Indiana, Illinois, Wisconsin, and Minnesota).
project_area: Great Lakes native fish species habitat restoration
demographic_requirements: None specified beyond eligibility criteria for applicant types.
eligibility_summary: Eligible applicants include institutions of higher education, non-profits, commercial organizations, U.S. territories, and state/local/Native American tribal governments. Individuals and federal agencies are ineligible. Projects must be within the Great Lakes basin in one of the eight U.S. Great Lakes states.
